name: Tactile: Giving Computer-Using Agents Hands and Feet
summary: arXiv:2607.14443v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Computer-use agents are becoming capable software operators, but their interface to desktop applications is still often a brittle motor layer: they l...
description: arXiv:2607.14443v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Computer-use agents are becoming capable software operators, but their interface to desktop applications is still often a brittle motor layer: they look at screenshots, predict coordinates, click, and hope that the visible state changed as intended. This collapses target grounding, action execution, and outcome verification into a single ambiguous...
author: Yong Liu, Zhenyi Zhong, Zhanpeng Shi
